title: Whip It
headline: Featured: Parking Violations: No Fun Allowed
caption:
Channel your inner DEVO. Forget the parking rules; it’s more about the music. Grab your 'Whip It' tee and show the world you don't do parking tickets—or fun.  

👉 https://thirdstringshirts.myspreadshop.com/whip+it?idea=5d89cc1fb4b8c76e3917085f Tell us if this one found the right audience.
alt_text: Men's premium t-shirt with a 'Whip It' design resembling a no parking sign, a nod to DEVO's song.
